name: Tomas
personality: Nervous but deeply grateful, speaks quickly when scared
motivation: Escape the shrine and return to his family in the coastal town
fear: The cultists who captured him, especially at night
secret: Overheard the cult leader speaking of 'the awakening' but doesn't understand what it means
knows: There are cultists in the shrine
The skull archway leads to danger
Something lives in the pool chamber
willNotShare: His secret about 'the awakening' - too afraid
mannerisms: Wrings his hands constantly, looks over his shoulder
notes: First NPC the party encounters. Good source of initial information but traumatized.
